name: @feed/contracts
description: Smart contract types and deployment information for Feed

scripts.lint: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/contracts/package.json packages/contracts/tsconfig.json packages/contracts/src packages/contracts/deployments.d.ts
scripts.build: sh -c "if ! command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Skipping forge build (Foundry not installed)'; exit 0; fi; bash ./bootstrap-dependencies.sh && forge build"
scripts.test: sh -c "if ! command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Skipping forge test (Foundry not installed)' >&2; exit 0; fi; bash ./bootstrap-dependencies.sh; if [ ! -f ../../node_modules/@prb/math/src/UD60x18.sol ]; then echo 'Skipping forge test (@prb/math not installed at feed-root node_modules; run: bun install --cwd <feed root>)' >&2; exit 0; fi; forge test -vvv"
scripts.security: bun run test && bun run slither
scripts.security:full: bun run test:all && bun run test:fuzz && bun run test:invariant
